Description: Mentions detection and evaluation of microarchitectural attacks (evasive Spectre), side-channel behaviors, and security monitoring using hardware performance counters.
Uses ML models (e.g., Random Forest, MLP, RNN) and evaluation metrics (ROC/AUC) to detect security attacks and analyze robustness under workload noise.
Focuses on CPU/GPU microarchitecture behavior (speculative execution, cache/branch events), hardware performance counters, and architecture-dependent effects on attack detection.
Applies statistical/ML-based techniques to distinguish attack vs. non-attack behavior in system telemetry (HPC time series and derived rates).
Analyzes how different workload types (text, image, code tasks) and resource utilization affect system signals and detection performance.
Mentions automated generation of code-related artifacts, including code summarization using LLMs.
Focuses on human-subject studies, annotation tasks, datasets, and evaluation methodology (e.g., inter-rater agreement) for assessing software engineering tools and artifacts.
Focuses on automated refactoring/repair-style recommendations to fix issues (here, performance faults due to lock contention).
Focus on energy consumption, energy efficiency, and environmental impact (carbon footprint) of software and especially generated code across platforms/languages.
Software engineering tasks and benchmarks that require combining code/text with visual inputs (images/videos, screenshots, diagrams) for debugging and validation.
Covers methods for improving program performance while preserving correctness (e.g., compiler-inspired passes, atomic edits, beam search optimization).
Methods for training and improving model behavior, including probabilistic modeling, reinforcement learning, and optimization for reasoning.
Language-model prompting, chain-of-thought/rationale generation, and post-training methods to improve LLM reasoning.
RL/RLHF-style optimization (e.g., PPO, reward shaping) used to learn or refine policies for generating rationales and answers.
